view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a shared booking record with per-person payment status is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a shared booking record with per-person payment status is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement by confirming that multiple bookings exist with distinct payment statuses for each participant. Evidence from the prior steps shows that two customers have confirmed bookings with associated payment details, indicating that the system tracks per-person payment statuses as required. Specifically, the evidence from the 'customer-book-primary' and 'customer-two-concurrent' steps demonstrates that both customers have their payment statuses recorded, fulfilling the requirement.
